query: Keep this change surgical and do not overdo the refactor.
Use Karpathy guidelines while fixing this bug.
Make the minimal safe change for this feature request.
This task is ambiguous; surface assumptions before coding.
Refactor this function but avoid speculative abstractions.
Fix the bug with a reproducer and preserve existing style.
Do a simple, scoped implementation with concrete verification.
Add logging only where needed and leave unrelated cleanup alone.
The code is risky; be conservative and prove the outcome.
Use a small plan with verify steps before editing.
Create a full PRP artifact under .codex/prps/plans.
Run the build-fix loop on these compiler errors.
Create a GitHub pull request from this branch.
Write Playwright tests for login and upload.
Convert a Claude command into a Codex workflow.
Commit the currently staged files.
Give me a market research report on developer tools.
Generate a hero image for a landing page.
Audit this OAuth flow for security vulnerabilities only.
List installable skills for browser automation.
